actions.say: The torch casts dancing shadows on the walls.
actions.speaker: Narrator

then.say: The shadows almost seem to move on their own… You recall the note's warning.
then.speaker: Narrator

actions.say: You press onward into the darkness…
actions.speaker: Narrator

actions.say: (This is as far as the demo goes. Thanks for playing!)
actions.speaker: Narrator

onEnter.say: A long hallway stretches before you, lit by a single torch.
onEnter.speaker: Narrator
